metadata.description: claude-obsidian Windows fork: a self-organizing AI second brain for Obsidian + Claude Code, adapted for Windows by michael-howard-cla. A persistent, compounding wiki vault of plain Markdown you own, based on Karpathy's LLM Wiki pattern.

plugins.name: claude-obsidian
plugins.description: Claude + Obsidian knowledge companion (Windows fork). v1.7 "Compound Vault" + v1.8 methodology modes close 5 of 5 priority gaps from the May 2026 compass artifact. Ships: substrate alignment with kepano/obsidian-skills, default Obsidian CLI transport, hybrid retrieval (Anthropic Sept 2024 contextual retrieval pattern: BM25 + cosine rerank), per-file advisory locking for multi-writer safety, pre-commit verifier agent, AND methodology modes (LYT / PARA / Zettelkasten / Generic) — first-class organizational support no other Claude+Obsidian competitor offers. v1.7.x audit fully closed; 50-query retrieval benchmark verified at +32pp top-1 / +41% error-reduction vs v1.6 baseline. Optional DragonScale Memory extension. Pairs with kepano/obsidian-skills (recommended) for canonical Obsidian primitives. Windows-native hooks and scripts.
